summary: Dow fell 280 pts on Apr 29; S&P 500 -0.04%; Nasdaq +0.04%. Fed held rates, noted elevated inflation. Meta tumbled after-hours on capex overspend fears. Alphabet surged on Google Cloud AI beat. Oil rose on Iran blockade reports.
